name: Growth
description: Exposure to companies priced or perceived for future growth.
interpretation_hint: Stronger signal suggests stronger sensitivity to growth expectations and long-duration equity behavior.

name: Value
description: Exposure to companies associated with lower valuation and more mature earnings profiles.
interpretation_hint: Stronger signal suggests stronger alignment with value-oriented market behavior.

name: Quality
description: Exposure to companies perceived as having durable earnings, resilient margins, or stronger balance-sheet quality.
interpretation_hint: Stronger signal suggests stronger alignment with quality-style market behavior.

name: Income
description: Exposure to companies associated with dividend yield or income-oriented ownership.
interpretation_hint: Stronger signal suggests greater sensitivity to income-seeking investor behavior.

name: Size
description: Exposure related to company size, typically used to distinguish large-cap from smaller-cap behavior.
interpretation_hint: Interpret the signal together with underlying size tags or size-linked methodology.

name: Momentum
description: Exposure to recent trend-following or price-strength behavior.
interpretation_hint: Stronger signal suggests stronger sensitivity to momentum-style market regimes.

name: High Beta
description: Exposure to equities that tend to move more aggressively than the broader market.
interpretation_hint: Stronger signal suggests stronger participation in high-beta market moves.

name: Low Volatility
description: Exposure to equities associated with relatively lower volatility or more stable trading profiles.
interpretation_hint: Stronger signal suggests stronger alignment with low-volatility behavior.

name: Defensive
description: Exposure to businesses that tend to be more resilient during economic slowdowns.
interpretation_hint: Stronger signal suggests stronger resilience-oriented or downside-protective behavior.

name: Cyclical
description: Exposure to businesses that tend to perform in line with economic expansion and demand sensitivity.
interpretation_hint: Stronger signal suggests stronger sensitivity to the economic cycle.

name: Consumer Strength
description: Exposure to consumer demand, discretionary spending, or household balance-sheet strength.
interpretation_hint: Stronger signal suggests stronger linkage to consumer-led economic strength.

name: Capex Cycle
description: Exposure to capital spending, industrial investment, or infrastructure buildout cycles.
interpretation_hint: Stronger signal suggests stronger linkage to business investment and capex activity.

name: Rate Sensitive
description: Exposure to changes in interest-rate expectations and discount-rate sensitivity.
interpretation_hint: Stronger signal suggests stronger sensitivity to rising or falling interest-rate regimes.

name: Duration Sensitive
description: Exposure to long-duration equity behavior, often linked to future cash-flow discounting.
interpretation_hint: Stronger signal suggests stronger reaction to changes in long-term yields and duration repricing.

name: Liquidity Sensitive
description: Exposure to changes in financial conditions, liquidity, and broad market risk appetite.
interpretation_hint: Stronger signal suggests stronger dependence on abundant liquidity and easier financial conditions.

name: Inflation Hedge
description: Exposure to businesses that may benefit from inflation, pricing power, or hard-asset linkage.
interpretation_hint: Stronger signal suggests stronger inflation-linked protection or pricing-power exposure.

name: Commodity Linked
description: Exposure to commodity prices, extraction, processing, or commodity-sensitive end markets.
interpretation_hint: Stronger signal suggests stronger dependence on commodity price cycles.

name: Energy Linked
description: Exposure to oil, gas, power, or broader energy-system dynamics.
interpretation_hint: Stronger signal suggests stronger linkage to energy markets and energy security themes.

name: China Exposure
description: Exposure to Chinese demand, supply chains, market access, or geopolitical dependence involving China.
interpretation_hint: Stronger signal suggests stronger sensitivity to China-linked economic and geopolitical developments.

name: Reshoring & Defense
description: Exposure to industrial reshoring, national security spending, and defense-oriented strategic investment.
interpretation_hint: Stronger signal suggests stronger alignment with defense spending, industrial policy, or domestic supply-chain rebuilding.
